title: Causal Evidence for Attention Head Imbalance in Modality Conflict Hallucination
summary:
arXiv:2605.19250v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Modality-conflict hallucination occurs when multimodal large language models (MLLMs) prioritize erroneous textual premises over contradictory visual evidence. To understand why visual evidence fails to prevail during generation, we take a mechanistic perspective and examine which internal components drive or resist this failure.
